song.title: Utterly Abandoned
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Utterly abandoned To the Holy Ghost! Seeking all His fulness At whatever cost;|| Cutting all the shorelines, Launching in the deep Of His mighty power, Strong to save and keep.
[C] Chorus Utterly abandoned To the Lord of all, Seeking all His fulness, Answ’ring His dear call.
[V2] 2) Utterly abandoned To the Holy Ghost! Oh! the sinking, sinking, Till the self is lost!|| Till the vessel’s emptied Broken at His feet; Waiting till His filling Makes the work complete.
[V3] 3) Utterly abandoned To the will of God; Walking in the pathway That my Master trod;|| Leaving ease and pleasure, Making Him my choice, Waiting for His guidance, List’ning for His voice.
[V4] 4) Utterly abandoned! Through eternity; My will never choosing, His it e’er shall be;|| All my plans and longings Lost in His sweet will, Having nothing, owning All things in Him still.
[V5] 5) Utterly abandoned! ’Tis so sweet to be Captive in His love-bonds, Yet so wondrous free;|| Free from sin’s dominion, Free from doubt and fear, Free from every worry, Burden, grief or care.
[V6] 6) Utterly abandoned! Oh, the rest is sweet, Waiting in His presence At His blessed feet;|| Waiting for the filling Of the Host divine, Who my inward parts shall Perfectly refine.
[V7] 7) Lo! His Spirit fills me, With His presence sweet! I, in Him, am blessed! I, in Him, complete!|| Now the light within me Never shall grow dim While abandoned ever, Living unto Him!
